xaxiu-harness.description: Cross-vendor verification via the harness: cross_vendor_audit + cross_vendor_panel tools. Requires the 'mcp' extra (pip install -e '.[mcp]').

context7.description: Live, version-accurate library docs (click / httpx / pytest-asyncio etc.). Windows: spawned via cmd/c npx (a bare npx silently fails to spawn — ENGINE-HEADLESS-PLAYBOOK §0.4). Swap to the hosted URL + API key if you prefer.
